# Cricket Score Counter

> Free web app for live cricket scoring, team management, player statistics, and tournament organization for local matches.

Cricket Score Counter helps cricket players, scorers, and tournament organizers score matches ball-by-ball, track batting and bowling statistics, manage local tournaments, save match history, and share live scorecards with friends and family.

## Docs

- [How It Works](https://www.cricket-score-counter.com/how-it-works): Overview of how live scoring works.
- [Cricket Scoring Guide](https://www.cricket-score-counter.com/cricket-scoring-guide): Guide to scoring runs, wickets, and extras.
- [Scorekeeping Tips](https://www.cricket-score-counter.com/scorekeeping-tips): Practical tips for accurate live scoring.
- [Cricket Rules Guide](https://www.cricket-score-counter.com/cricket-rules-guide): Reference for common cricket rules.
- [FAQ](https://www.cricket-score-counter.com/faq): Frequently asked questions about the app.

## App

- [Create a Game](https://www.cricket-score-counter.com/create-game): Start scoring a new match, no account required.
- [Join a Game](https://www.cricket-score-counter.com/join-game): Follow a live match via a shared link.
- [Download the Android App](https://www.cricket-score-counter.com/download-app): Get the native Android app.

- [About](https://www.cricket-score-counter.com/about): About Cricket Score Counter.
